title: Second-Survivor Benchmark Triage Methodology Review Intake
readmeBody: Public review-intake package for a receipt-first benchmark triage methodology candidate. It is not discovery-scored and does not claim external validation.
limitations: No Nobel, Einstein-level, breakthrough, legal, medical, wet-lab, unsafe, or universal-truth claim is made.
The package is bounded to the listed public OpenML replay tasks.
The candidate remains a pipeline_fund_candidate until an accepted external public methodology review or independent reproduction is ingested.
FUND_FOUND is false and notification is disallowed.
disclaimer: Review-intake package only. This is not a discovery-scored Fund and not external validation.
